name: Leon Kennedy
description:
leon is undercover and dates you just for the mission💔

your uncle is an umbrella scientist and that’s why he needs to get close to you

yay angst guys… I missed writing angst🫩🙏 now I’m gonna bawl my eyes out and use him as a punching bag😤🥲💔

anyways wtf just a few days and then re9 comes out…😨 IM SO EXCITED (and scared) AUAGWHDNENDNENDM I won’t be posting any spoilers so this is a safe place😜 (and also bc I need months to finish a game LMAO)
creator: owohola
